text_block_list.name: Legendary Bard
text_block_list.text:
I, the Overlord, am determined to be reborn new
and true. Just at this critical moment, I detect
signs of Poseidon's coming from the sea...

text_block_list.name: Legendary Bard
text_block_list.text:
But contemptibly, what appears instead is the
Golden Generation's Phantom Bird, El Condor
Pasa—arisen to educate me in the ways of
combat!

text_block_list.name: Legendary Bard
text_block_list.text:
I meet the wrestler head-on. And then I see
clearly—this is how a ruler does battle! The truly
strong do not fear to be a target, no matter how
vexing it may be.

text_block_list.name: Legendary Bard
text_block_list.text:
Thus, I have now learned how I must fight as the
Overlord—no—as the Centurial Overlord!
